description: The St. Lawrence Seaway Management Corporation requires a winter shipping closure assessment based on climatological air temperatures. Using the air temperature dataset (air.mon.ltm.nc) from ~/PanoplyData/, create a 1D Time-Series Line plot for the seaway chokepoint at 45°N, 75°W (using the 0-360° longitude system). Export the plot to ~/Documents/Seaway/st_lawrence_temp_series.png and generate a structured text report at ~/Documents/Seaway/shipping_season_report.txt following the requirements specified in ~/Desktop/seaway_closure_mandate.txt.
